'''Xant Flashheel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] from [[Phemiss]], on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. He was a rambunctious adolescent with a short temper, and had broken two horns in fights. Flashheel made a living as a [[swoopshaw]] driver in Phemiss, though he longed to leave New Plympto and visit the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Flashheel was a fan of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] underground music, and would often annoy his passengers by playing music loudly.<ref name="CCW" />
